---
title: "Laszlo Szabo"
image: images/profile_pic.jpeg
about:
  template: trestles
  links:
    - icon: twitter
      text: Twitter
      href: https://x.com/drszabolaszlo
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com/in/drszabolaszlo
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/laszlo75
    - icon: envelope
      text: Contact
      href: mailto:laszlo.szabo@wales.nhs.uk
---


I am a Consultant Transplant Surgeon with a clinical and research focus on kidney and pancreas transplantation, organ retrieval, organ utilisation, and perioperative outcomes. Based at the Cardiff Transplant Unit, I lead initiatives aimed at improving access to transplantation, refining donor risk stratification, and optimising post-transplant care.

My academic interests include surgical innovation, organ preand the application of data science to transplant decision-making. I collaborate with national programmes to improve organ utilisation policy and contribute to multicentre clinical studies.
